Auto Body Repair in Grand Forks.

Including dent, glass, and hail damage.

Rydell Auto Body Shop is fully certified and the preferred body shop of insurance companies everywhere. We hope you never need us, but when you do we're here to help.

Schedule an appointment today.

Fully certified for your peace-of-mind.

Certification partners include ASA, I-CAR Gold, Honda ProFirst, Nissan, GM, Ford Aluminum, VeriFacts, Assured Performance, ABRN, and Toyota Certified Collision.

Learn more about our certifications

For when life happens.

We hope you never need us. But when you do, our state-of-the-art facilities and fully certified professionals are here to help.

Schedule an appointment today.

What our guests say

Automatically scrolling customer reviews. Pause animations in your system settings if you prefer reduced motion.

Kathryn R | 2018 Chevrolet Equinox

Confirmed Service Customer

11/2/2025

From the first call to schedule my windshield replacement, I was treated professionally. When body shop staff knew I needed an oil change, they made the arrangements. The PDQ staff were so professional and arranged for new tires. Brock was so courteous and helpful. When I picked up my vehicle, it was a busy time with Trunk or Treat but staff treated me so well and went out of their way to help. Excellent service!

GRAND FORKS, ND

Brian B | 2025 GMC Sierra 1500

Confirmed Sales Customer

8/15/2025

Craig C in sales and the Body Shop staff (from receptionist to those who prepared estimate) all helped me through the process to replace my destroyed GMC and lower my stress level. I made it home with my new Denali and look forward to setting up all my preferences in the infotainment center system! Thanks to everyone including the lady assisting Craig with the paperwork!

MENTOR, MN

Confirmed Service Customer

The box on my pickup was not in line with the cab. I received great service at the Bodyshop from Dan, Loren and Ryan. Looks great!

Why choose Rydell Auto Body of Grand Forks?

Looking for peace-of-mind? You've come to the right place.

We are an ASE and I-CAR Gold Certified Body Shop.

We are an OEM Certified Body Shop.

We are a Preferred Body Shop for Insurance Companies in Grand Forks.

Schedule an appointment today.

Grand Forks’ most comprehensive auto body repair shop

  • Hail damage
  • PDR
  • Auto glass
  • Recalibration

Hail damage repair in Grand Forks

Free hail damage estimates — we work with all insurance companies and walk you through every step.

Hail damage is stressful enough without worrying about cost and paperwork. Our team brings your vehicle in, washes it to reveal the damage, and marks each dent so you can see exactly what the storm did. From paintless dent repair for smaller dents to full conventional repair when needed, we’ll get you back on the road with a complimentary detail when the work is done.

Hail damage repair details

Paintless dent repair (PDR) in Grand Forks

Whether it’s pesky hail damage or just a small door ding, our experienced Paintless Dent Repair (PDR) technician can get most of them out. Our technician will access the damage from behind the panel using a series of rods and techniques to essentially “massage” out the dent and dependent on the extent of the damage this could save hundreds to thousands of dollars in unneeded repairs. When you work with Rydell Auto Body and Glass we will make sure we give you the best option and most PDR services can be done within a day and can be scheduled at your convenience.

Paintless dent removal details

Windshield & auto glass in Grand Forks

At Rydell Auto Body and Glass we have an in-house glass technician which allows us to perform all of our windshield replacements and repairs right in our facility. Our glass technician is fully certified to make sure you are not only getting a quality repair but it will be safe for you and your passengers. Once we have either repaired or replaced your windshield we will give you our complimentary vehicle detail and as always we will work with your insurance company on your behalf or we will make sure you get the best price so make sure you give us a call as most windshields can be replaced within a day!

Auto glass details

ADAS & vehicle recalibration in Grand Forks

Factory-accurate calibration after collision repair or glass work—done in-house, not outsourced.

Modern safety systems rely on cameras and sensors that must stay aligned after a windshield replacement or structural repair. Our in-house recalibration center restores your ADAS features to factory standards so lane assist, emergency braking, and blind spot monitoring work as designed.

Vehicle recalibration details

OUR REPAIR PROCESS

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua. Ut enim ad minim veniam, quis nostrud exercitation ullamco laboris nisi ut aliquip ex ea commodo consequat.

1

Initial Contact

The first step on your way to getting your vehicle repaired is to meet with one of our highly trained Customer Service Representatives (CSR). You will be asked a few questions about the accident and the method of payment for the damages, but as always, our estimates are free. We may also discuss how the repair process will proceed if you have your vehicle repaired by Rydell Auto Body and Glass, along with rental vehicle options and any insurance questions. We want to make sure you are comfortable and fully informed prior to the start of your repairs. If you choose to repair with us we will then be able to schedule you for an appointment that works best for you.

2

Estimation Process

The first step on your way to getting your vehicle repaired is to meet with one of our highly trained Customer Service Representatives (CSR). You will be asked a few questions about the accident and the method of payment for the damages, but as always, our estimates are free. We may also discuss how the repair process will proceed if you have your vehicle repaired by Rydell Auto Body and Glass, along with rental vehicle options and any insurance questions. We want to make sure you are comfortable and fully informed prior to the start of your repairs. If you choose to repair with us we will then be able to schedule you for an appointment that works best for you.

3

Metal Repair Process

Once your vehicle comes to our shop for repairs, we will first inspect all of the parts in comparison to your vehicle, this ensures that you will get back the same looking vehicle as it was prior to the accident. Then one of our I-CAR Gold Certified metal technicians will complete all the body work in accordance with your vehicle's OEM guidelines. As part of the repair, we will inspect for any additional damage that could have been missed during the initial estimate and make sure there is no structure damage that could lead to ill-fitting parts or damage further down the road. We will then prime the repaired area and get it ready to be painted.

4

Paint Process

When the vehicle arrives at our in-house paint department, we will mask off any areas that we do not want to be painted. Our paint technicians will then prep all the repaired panels to ensure that the paint will have a flawless finish, free of dust or debris. When the vehicle is ready to be sprayed with our Standox Waterborne Paint we will pull it into our state-of-the-art, IR material drying paint booths where we will apply the proper amount of paint in accordance with your vehicles OEM specifications.

5

Buff & Reassembly

When your vehicle comes out of the paint booth, we will then buff the painted area to remove any "dirt nibs" that may have been in the paint. At this time, we will also inspect the paint color and texture to ensure that it matches the unpainted panels of your vehicle. Once the buffing is completed, we will move it back to the Metal Technician to begin reassembly on your vehicle. We are reaching the end of the repair process, and your vehicle is almost back to you. When reassembly is completed, the technician will inspect the repaired area to ensure proper fit and color and test drive the vehicle to guarantee that you are getting back the best quality as possible.

6

Complimentary Detail

When your vehicle is fully repaired, we will perform a complete exterior wash along with an express interior wipe down. We will hand wash the complete exterior with our in-house wash bay using soft head brushes and a mild detergent, once we have washed your vehicle, we will hand dry the exterior and the door jams. We will then vacuum the carpets and seats and wipe down the interior surfaces to ensure you are completely satisfied with your repair. Now that your vehicle is repaired, we will give you a call and even start your vehicle in the winter if you want.
